title: MCP Data References
description: Schemas for passing opaque data references between servers, enabling direct server-to-server data transfer without routing through the client context.

DataReference.title: Data Reference
DataReference.description: An opaque handle to data produced by a server. Can be passed to another server for direct consumption.

ref_id.description: Unique identifier for this data reference.

origin_server.description: Name of the MCP server that produced this reference.

mime_type.description: MIME type of the referenced data.

size_bytes.description: Size of the referenced data in bytes, if known.

access_url.description: Signed URL for direct access. Servers MAY use this for direct transfer.

value.description: Hex-encoded hash of the referenced data.

checksum.description: Integrity check for the referenced data.

ImportFromRefRequest.title: Import From Reference
ImportFromRefRequest.description: Request to import data from a reference produced by another server.

origin_server.description: Server that holds the referenced data.

target_format.description: Desired format for the imported data.

imported_resource_id.description: Identifier for the imported resource in the target system.

rows_imported.description: Number of rows/records imported, if applicable.
